chapter_title: St. Improvements & Assessments in Certain Municipalities
text:
(a) A single assessment may be made against multiple parcels of property owned by the same person.

(b) Property owned jointly may be assessed jointly.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 313. St. Improvements & Assessments in Certain Municipalities
##### § 313.043 — Assessment Against Parcels Owned Jointly

(a) A single assessment may be made against multiple parcels of property owned by the same person.

(b) Property owned jointly may be assessed jointly.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A single assessment may be made against multiple parcels of property owned by the same person.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Property owned jointly may be assessed jointly.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
